top_signals.title: Suspicious Polyfill login prompts pop up on Toshiba, Muji websites
top_signals.summary: Tech giant Toshiba and mega-retailer Muji warned visitors that suspicious sign-in screens popping up on their websites could collect credentials. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Brave Software releases Origin for a paid, bloat-free browsing experience
top_signals.summary: Brave has announced the public release of Brave Origin, a paid minimalist version of its browser that strips out cryptocurrency, AI, rewards, and other monetization-focused features. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Top Goldman lawyer Ruemmler to remain with bank despite Epstein ties
top_signals.summary: General counsel resigned after revelations about relationship with disgraced financier but now will stay on as adviser
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Goldman’s Flood Sees Buying Opportunity in Stock Market Selloff
top_signals.summary: Friday’s pullback in US equities offers a chance to add exposure rather than a reason to retreat, with a clear path for the S&P 500 to reach 8,000 this year, according to John Flood, the head of Americas equities execution services at Goldman Sachs Group Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Marvell Technology, Flex Set to Join S&P 500 Later This Month
top_signals.summary: Marvell Technology Inc and Flex Ltd. will join the S&P 500 in the latest quarterly rebalance, S&P Dow Jones Indices said Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Number 10 hits out at people stoking ‘division’ after JD Vance’s claims about Nowak case
top_signals.summary: Downing Street criticises those trying to ‘interfere’ in UK democracy
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Authorities in the Netherlands have arrested the co-owners of two related Internet hosting companies for operating IT infrastructure used by Russia to carry out cyberattacks, influence operations and disinformation campaigns inside the European Union. The two men were the focus of a 2025 KrebsOnSecurity story about how their hosting companies had assumed control over the technical infrastructure of Stark Industries Solutions, an Internet service provider sanctioned last year by the EU as a frequent staging ground for cyber mischief from Russia's intelligence agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. House tax committee weighs crypto bills, including relief for small transactions
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.summary: This guidance establishes the concept of risk management.

top_signals.title: Hoekstra casts Canada as key US critical minerals partner
top_signals.summary: US Ambassador Pete Hoekstra outlined a vision of closer continental integration built on Canada's resource wealth, mining expertise and longstanding industrial ties with the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
